name: canonical_loan_application
description: Canonical structure for a commercial loan application package. parse_loan_package normalizes raw borrower files into this shape; all downstream tools consume it.
_TODO_step_4: Define the full canonical shape below. The reference version on the `main` branch is the answer key.
Top-level required: borrower_id, business_name, industry_naics, requested_amount, requested_term_months, purpose, financials.

Each financials[] entry needs: fiscal_year, revenue, cogs, opex, ebitda, net_income, total_assets, total_liabilities, equity, cash, accounts_receivable, inventory, current_assets, current_liabilities.
Keep this file valid JSON — the /api/schemas endpoint serves it as-is.

business_name.description: Legal name of the borrowing entity.

requested_amount.description: TODO (Step 4): requested loan principal in USD.

requested_term_months.description: TODO (Step 4): requested amortization term in months.

financials.description: Yearly financial statements, ordered oldest to newest. Three years expected.

properties._TODO: Add the remaining fields: cogs, opex, ebitda, net_income, total_assets, total_liabilities, equity, cash, accounts_receivable, inventory, current_assets, current_liabilities.
